sections.paragraph:
ἐϰτός [the suffix -τος suggests source] adv. basically suggesting disconnectedness

—1. of position locally as opposed to within, outside Mt 23:26 (here as noun τὸ ἐκτός); 1 Cor 6:18; 2 Cor 12:2.

—2. as marker of an exception unless, except 1 Cor 14:5; 15:2; 1 Ti 5:19. W. gen. apart/aside from, except Ac 26:22; 1 Cor 15:27.
